signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA MARCH 2026 INFLATION RISES TO 2.2-2.16% YoY | YES | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, per Trading Economics, or 2.16% per RateInflation.com, both below market forecasts of 2.4%[2][4].
